name: gb-astra-plugins
description: Internal plugin marketplace for Claude Code — a curated collection of skills, agents, and hooks for developer productivity.

plugins.name: code-reviewer
plugins.description: Code review toolkit with specialized agents for duplicate detection, EUII leak scanning, design simplification, code simplification, and log review.

plugins.name: git-helper
plugins.description: Git assistant agent for branching, merging, and repository management.

plugins.name: lint-on-save
plugins.description: Automatically runs linting after file edits via hooks.

plugins.name: azure-devops-helper
plugins.description: Azure DevOps integration with work item management, PR publishing, and iterative PR tending skills, plus a DevOps workflow assistant agent.

plugins.name: orleans-helper
plugins.description: Microsoft Orleans patterns, best practices, and code review for virtual actor model applications — covers grain design, concurrency, cross-grain communication, streams, and serialization.
